name: Mac Swit
subtitle: Smart Battery Management
description: A menubar app that automatically controls your smart plug to extend your battery's lifespan
longDescription: MacSwit automatically controls your smart plug by providing you to choose from threshold-based automation, event-driven control, or a hybrid of both.
features: Threshold-based automation to manage battery health
Hybrid control combining both automation and event-driven features
Customizable settings for personalized battery management
